analysis.symptom: Severe throbbing headache with nausea and visual aura
analysis.advice: Take prescribed migraine medication if available. Rest in dark quiet room. Apply cold compress. If symptoms worsen or new symptoms appear, seek medical attention within 24 hours.

example_cases.input: Runny nose, sneezing, mild fatigue for 2 days

output.advice: Rest, stay hydrated, use saline spray. Over-the-counter cold medicine may help. Seek care if fever develops or symptoms persist beyond 7 days.

example_cases.input: Crushing chest pain radiating to left arm with shortness of breath

output.advice: EMERGENCY - Call 911 immediately. This could be a heart attack. Do not drive yourself. Chew aspirin if not allergic.

example_cases.input: Sore throat and cough getting better after 3 days of rest

output.advice: Continue rest and hydration. Symptoms should resolve in 2-3 days. Return to normal activities gradually.

Mild.description: Minor discomfort, does not affect daily activities

Moderate.description: Significant discomfort, affects some daily activities

Severe.description: Severe pain or disability, prevents normal activities
